title: core:update-spec-metadata
description: Agents and external tools that generate LLM-optimized metadata need a safe way to save these fields without managing the entire machine-readable summary or risking overwriting deterministic fields. The `UpdateSpecMetadata` use case performs a fresh deterministic extraction of spec metadata and merges it with agent-provided optimized fields before persisting, ensuring the metadata file is always up-to-date and consistent.
context: Agents and external tools that generate LLM-optimized metadata need a safe way to save these fields without managing the entire machine-readable summary or risking overwriting deterministic fields. The `UpdateSpecMetadata` use case performs a fresh deterministic extraction of spec metadata and merges it with agent-provided optimized fields before persisting, ensuring the metadata file is always up-to-date and consistent.

rules: The use case SHALL perform a fresh extraction of metadata using the schema's `metadataExtraction` rules from the current spec files.
The use case SHALL merge the provided partial metadata payload into the freshly extracted deterministic metadata. The merge SHALL specifically target `optimizedDescription` and `optimizedContext`.
The resulting merged metadata SHALL be validated against `strictSpecMetadataSchema` and persisted via `SaveSpecMetadata`.

scenarios.name: Merges with latest deterministic data
given: a spec whose title was changed in spec.md but metadata.json is not yet updated
when: UpdateSpecMetadata is called with an optimized payload
then: AND the resulting metadata contains the NEW title from spec.md merged with the optimized fields

scenarios.name: Partial update preserves other fields
then: the resulting metadata has the new optimizedDescription

scenarios.name: Merged metadata is saved
then: it calls SaveSpecMetadata with the complete merged object
